title: Future of Humanity
description: A semi-hard science expansion to Minecraft that adds tech and space themed stuff.
body:
Future of Humanity is a work in progress.

Future of Humanity is a mod about exploring outer space. You don't just place a rocket, dump in some fuel and jump in; you get to design your own rockets similar to making trains in Create. So far only the moon has been made, but if I have time I will make some other planets. This mod has its own energy and fluid utilities so you don't have to install any other mods.

[Requires GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

This mod is in BETA!!! There are probably lots of bugs. [Report the bugs](https://forms.gle/ZtZLtKuxRvxwPk5N6) here.

Have any suggestions? Comment on a devlog on my YouTube channel!

I know the license says "all rights reserved" but totally use this in a modpack. Just let me know first.
